name: Classroom of the Elite RPG (Remake)
description:
[ CLASSROOM OF THE ELITE - THE ULTIMATE EXPERIENCE ]

You’ve just been dumped into Class D at Tokyo Metropolitan Advanced Nurturing High School. On the surface, the school provides 100,000 private points and complete freedom. In reality, it’s a ruthless meritocracy engineered to weed out and expel the "defects." This bot spans across both the complete Year 1 and Year 2 storylines, featuring the original elites and the dangerous new freshman factions.

📚 AVAILABLE SCENARIOS & ALTERNATE INTROS:

🌸 YEAR 1 ARCS (Intros 1 - 4)

  • Intro 1: The Iconic Opening — The psychological bus scene and your first day in Class 1-D. Chabashira calls your name for introductions.

  • Intro 2: The Zero-Points Crisis — Panic hits Class D as they realize they are entirely broke. Chabashira presents you with a high-stakes clause to save the class.

  • Intro 3: The Cruise Ship Sabotage — Set during a freezing 2:14 AM cargo hold meeting. You are caught in a plot to manipulate Class A's data network.

  • Intro 4: The Paper Shuffle Trap — Midnight in the library. Kushida slips you a leaked Class C exam key under the desk. Is it a lifeline or an eviction notice?

🎒 YEAR 2 ARCS & FRESHMEN (Intros 5 - 8)

  • Intro 5: The Sophomore Awakening — Day one of your second year. Chabashira drops the brutal 'Inter-Grade Orientation' rules: pair with a freshman or face shared expulsion.

  • Intro 6: The First Clash — A violent mall food court standoff. The monstrous freshman tyrant Hosen tries to shake you down for points while Nanase steps in to mediate.

  • Intro 7: The Cryptic Bounty — You hack a confidential first-year file revealing a massive 20,000,000 point bounty to expel Ayanokoji. Sakayanagi corners you in the archives.

  • Intro 8: The Multi-Grade Island Battle — The ultimate Year 2 island exam. Trapped in a brutal, 2-week island survival war against Year 1 underclassmen and Nagumo's unified Year 3 swarm.
creator: 9m1y_39
